title: Epic: ChatContact methods
description:
Why: Current codebase only has ChatContact/get. The spec defines changes, set (update statusText/statusEmoji/presence), query, and queryChanges. These are needed for a full contact management experience and real-time presence sync.

What:
- ChatContact/changes
- ChatContact/set (update presence, statusText, statusEmoji)
- ChatContact/query (filter by presence, searchString)
- ChatContact/queryChanges
- Fixture tests for all four methods

Depends on: types.rs upgrades epic (jmap-chat-tui-1aq), methods refactor epic
close_reason: All 4 methods implemented, 46 tests passing, review converged in 1 round
